title: RaftConsensusNats
description: NATS subjects owned by dd-raft-consensus (in-process Raft consensus simulator that drives leader election and log replication across a virtual cluster under configurable chaos: drops, partitions, restarts). The server subscribes to propose/scenario requests under the dd-raft-consensus queue group, publishes committed-log results plus a fan-out of state-transition events for chaos-testing with loadtest harnesses. Payloads carry a raft.consensus.v1 schemaVersion envelope and must not contain secrets.

$dd:nats.summary: Raft consensus simulation request/result pipeline with state-transition event fan-out.

subjects.name: RaftProposeRequests
subjects.description: Inbound Raft scenario/propose requests (cluster size, command stream, chaos parameters) consumed by the raft-consensus simulator. Subscribed with the dd-raft-consensus queue group so requests load-balance across replicas. Default for RAFT_PROPOSE_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.raft.propose.requests

subjects.name: RaftConsensusResults
subjects.description: Consensus outcomes (committed log, term/leader history, election counts, divergence detection) emitted after a simulated run. Carries a raft.consensus.v1 envelope. Default for RAFT_RESULT_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.raft.consensus.results

subjects.name: RaftConsensusEvents
subjects.description: Fan-out of per-step consensus state transitions (role changes, elections won/lost, entries appended/committed, dropped/partitioned messages) for live observation and chaos-test assertions. Broadcast with no queue group. Default for RAFT_EVENT_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.raft.consensus.events

queueGroups.name: RaftConsensusQueueGroup
queueGroups.description: Shared queue group used by dd-raft-consensus replicas consuming propose/scenario requests.
